scenes.description: Omaru Polka, Takane Lui, and Houshou Marine finish performing 'Triangle Dreamer'.
Transition scene with a dark stage and floating balloons.
Omaru Polka and Takane Lui perform 'PHOENIX PRAYER'.
Outro music with Polka appearing in a new white outfit.

subtitles.original:
PHOENIX PRAYER
作詞・作曲：中村未来
subtitles.english:
PHOENIX PRAYER
Lyrics & Composition: Miku Nakamura

subtitles.original: 轟々と続くショート・ショート
subtitles.english: Short stories that continue roaringly

subtitles.original: 喪失は絶対で 糸解けば
subtitles.english: Loss is absolute, and if you unravel the threads

subtitles.original: 今夜 輪廻消火 悲しみが
subtitles.english: Tonight, reincarnation is extinguished, sadness...

subtitles.original: 混沌の子守唄 歌ってるよ
subtitles.english: ...is singing a lullaby of chaos.

subtitles.original: 運命に理由があるのならば
subtitles.english: If there is a reason for fate

subtitles.original: すべてを賭けてみたいの
subtitles.english: I want to try betting everything

subtitles.original: あなたを守りたい
subtitles.english: I want to protect you

subtitles.original: どこまでも高く飛べるわ
subtitles.english: We can fly as high as we want

subtitles.original: どこまでも強く強くなれるわ
subtitles.english: We can become as strong as we want

subtitles.original: 信じて 私に出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle of meeting me

subtitles.original: 霧開く不死鳥の炎灯いて
subtitles.english: Lighting the phoenix's flame that clears the fog

subtitles.original: あなたの側
subtitles.english: By your side

subtitles.original: ブラブラ 眼差し泣きたくなるの
subtitles.english: Dangling, your gaze makes me want to cry

subtitles.original: フラッシュバック フラッシュバック
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback

subtitles.original: 振りほどけ 焦勢 挑み続けろ
subtitles.english: Shake it off, keep challenging the impatience

subtitles.original: 飄々と佇むホット・ショット
subtitles.english: A hotshot standing aloofly

subtitles.original: 私が必用でしょ？
subtitles.english: You need me, don't you?

subtitles.original: 今夜 輪廻勝者 正しさが
subtitles.english: Tonight, the winner of reincarnation, correctness...

subtitles.original: ストレート 最前線に押し出すよ
subtitles.english: ...is pushed straight to the front lines

subtitles.original: 運命に理由があるのならば
subtitles.english: If there is a reason for fate

subtitles.original: 優しい世界をあげたい
subtitles.english: I want to give you a kind world

subtitles.original: あなたを包むわ
subtitles.english: I will embrace you

subtitles.original: どこまでも早く射抜くわ
subtitles.english: We will pierce through as fast as we can

subtitles.original: どこまでも熱く熱く焦がすわ
subtitles.english: We will burn as hotly as we can

subtitles.original: 信じて 私に出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle of meeting me

subtitles.original: 霧開く不死鳥の炎灯いて
subtitles.english: Lighting the phoenix's flame that clears the fog

subtitles.original: あなたの側
subtitles.english: By your side

subtitles.original: ブラブラ 仇越し光を見せて
subtitles.english: Dangling, show me the light through the grudge

subtitles.original: フラッシュバック フラッシュバック
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback

subtitles.original: 許さない 憂勢 進み続けろ
subtitles.english: I won't forgive the melancholy, keep moving forward

subtitles.original: 尽きるまで 側に居ると
subtitles.english: Until I'm exhausted, I'll be by your side

subtitles.original: 鼓動が早くて 眩暈がする
subtitles.english: My heart is beating fast, I feel dizzy

subtitles.original: すべて捧げる
subtitles.english: I offer everything

subtitles.original: もう決めたの
subtitles.english: I've already decided

subtitles.original: 最後のチャンスだから
subtitles.english: Because it's the last chance

subtitles.original: もう離さない
subtitles.english: I won't let go anymore

subtitles.original: あなたに問う 未来の風
subtitles.english: I ask you, the wind of the future

subtitles.original: 跨って行け
subtitles.english: Ride on it and go!

subtitles.original: どこまでも高く飛べるわ
subtitles.english: We can fly as high as we want

subtitles.original: どこまでも強く強くなれるわ
subtitles.english: We can become as strong as we want

subtitles.original: 信じて 私に出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle of meeting me

subtitles.original: 闇夜も望めば 輝夜にするから
subtitles.english: Even a dark night, if you wish, I'll turn it into a bright night

subtitles.original: 霧開く不死鳥の炎灯いて
subtitles.english: Lighting the phoenix's flame that clears the fog

subtitles.original: あなたの側
subtitles.english: By your side

subtitles.original: ブラブラ 眼差し泣きたくなるの
subtitles.english: Dangling, your gaze makes me want to cry

subtitles.original: フラッシュバック フラッシュバック
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback

subtitles.original: 振りほどけ 焦勢 挑み続けろ
subtitles.english: Shake it off, keep challenging the impatience

subtitles.original: ブラブラ 仇越し光を見せて
subtitles.english: Dangling, show me the light through the grudge

subtitles.original: フラッシュバック フラッシュバック
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback

subtitles.original: 許さない 憂勢 進み続けろ
subtitles.english: I won't forgive the melancholy, keep moving forward
